rules.rule_text:
title: Cisco Disabling Logging
id: 9e8f6035-88bf-4a63-96b6-b17c0508257e
status: test
description: Turn off logging locally or remote
references:
- https://www.cisco.com/en/US/docs/ios/security/command/reference/sec_a2.pdf
author: Austin Clark
date: 2019-08-11
modified: 2023-01-04
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1562.001
logsource:
  product: cisco
  service: aaa
detection:
  keywords:
  - no logging
  - no aaa new-model
  condition: keywords
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
